titleStmt.title: SII 22.85: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 85. (A.R. No. 85 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA—12th YEAR.

summary.p: This records a gift of 500 kuḻi of land at Araṅgam alias Śōḻaṉ-Arambaichaturvēdimaṅgalam on the southern bank of the Peṇṇai for the requirement of offerings during the ardhajāma service in the temple of Tāṉtōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiyanāyaṉār at Śaṇbai alias Vīrarājēndrapuram in Vāṇagōppāḍi a division of Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by Soṉṉatoṅgap-Pallavaraiyaṉ Āḷavandāṉ Nīrēṟṟaperumāḻ alias Rājarāja Śiśupālaṉ of Pērāyūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīku(l)lottuṅkaco
ḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 2vatu rājarājavaḷaṉāṭṭu vā
ṇakoppāṭi peṇṇai vaṭakarai caṇpaiyāṉa
virarājentirapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruttāṉtoṉṟi
Āḷuṭaiyyaṉāyaṉāṟkku tiruvattacāmapaṭikku tiruva
mutukkum kaṟiyamutukkum neyyamutu tayiramutu A
ṭaikkāyyamutu tirumeṟpūccukkum perā(y)yūr Ū
(r)ruṭaiyāṉ coṉṉatoṅkapallavaraiyaṉ Āḷa
vaṉtāṉ nirreṟṟaperumāḷāṉṉa Irājarājacicupā
laṉṉen peṇṇait tenkarai Araṅkamāṉa coḻa
narampai catuṟuvetimaṅkalattu naṉcai nila
m vāḷḷaiyūr nāyanṉār tevatāṉattukku meṟku
kaṭaiyaviṭṭa kuḻi Aññūṟu Iṉṉilam 5 100
viṭṭeṉ cantirātittavarai celvatāka Itu māṟuvāṉ
Eḻānnarakattil kiḻānarakam pukuvāṉ tan miṇāṭṭiyai ta
ṉ kutiraikku pulliṭum paṟaiyaṉṉukku kuṭuppāṉ Itu pa
nma(m)āheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.85 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
